en: You do something to me that I can't explain Hold me closer and I feel no pain
ja: 頭の中で、君は車にいて私のところに来て、ドアの前で話せなくなる、でもそれが甘い
zhTW: 在我腦海裡，你在車上朝我過來，到了門口卻說不出話，但我覺得那很甜
vi: Trong dau toi, ban dang tren xe va den cho toi, den truoc cua va khong the noi, nhung toi thay dieu do that ngot ngao

en: Every beat of my heart, we got something going on
To know love is blind, it requires a dedication
All this love we feel needs no conversation
Making love with each other, uh-uh
Islands in the stream, that is what we are
No one in between, how can we be wrong?
Sail away with me to another world
And we rely on each other, uh-huh
From one lover to another, uh-huh
